instruction: [bell scene] Add a sound wave on the left of the bell: polyline (14,60)→(20,56)→(14,52), stroke #222, stroke-width 1, no fill.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="bell" data-source="heroicons/outline/bell.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M14.857 17.082a23.848 23.848 0 0 0 5.454-1.31A8.967 8.967 0 0 1 18 9.75V9A6 6 0 0 0 6 9v.75a8.967 8.967 0 0 1-2.312 6.022c1.733.64 3.56 1.085 5.455 1.31m5.714 0a24.255 24.255 0 0 1-5.714 0m5.714 0a3 3 0 1 1-5.714 0"/></g>
  <circle id="ringer" fill="#222" cx="64" cy="110" r="3" />
  <circle id="badge" fill="#e63946" cx="92" cy="28" r="6" />
  <circle id="badge-count" fill="white" cx="92" cy="28" r="1.5" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="bell" data-source="heroicons/outline/bell.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M14.857 17.082a23.848 23.848 0 0 0 5.454-1.31A8.967 8.967 0 0 1 18 9.75V9A6 6 0 0 0 6 9v.75a8.967 8.967 0 0 1-2.312 6.022c1.733.64 3.56 1.085 5.455 1.31m5.714 0a24.255 24.255 0 0 1-5.714 0m5.714 0a3 3 0 1 1-5.714 0"/></g>
  <circle id="ringer" fill="#222" cx="64" cy="110" r="3" />
  <circle id="badge" fill="#e63946" cx="92" cy="28" r="6" />
  <circle id="badge-count" fill="white" cx="92" cy="28" r="1.5" />
  <polyline id="wave-1" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" fill="none" points="14,60 20,56 14,52" />
</svg>
